PropertyTypes.Caption: Show (un)check all toggle
PropertyTypes.Description: Show a checkbox in the grid header to check or uncheck multiple items.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Keep selection
PropertyTypes.Description: If enabled, selected items will stay selected unless cleared by the user or a Nanoflow.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Show refresh indicator
PropertyTypes.Description: Show a refresh indicator when the data is being loaded.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Attribute
PropertyTypes.Description: Attribute is required if the column can be sorted or filtered

PropertyTypes.Caption: Allow row events
PropertyTypes.Description: If set to yes, then all default events on the row, such as "on click" or selection, will be triggered when the user interacts with custom content.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Sorting
PropertyTypes.Description: Enable sorting for all columns unless specified otherwise in the column setting

PropertyTypes.Caption: Resizing
PropertyTypes.Description: Enable resizing for all columns unless specified otherwise in the column setting

PropertyTypes.Caption: Reordering
PropertyTypes.Description: Enable reordering for all columns unless specified otherwise in the column setting

PropertyTypes.Caption: Hiding
PropertyTypes.Description: Enable hiding for all columns unless specified otherwise in the column setting

PropertyTypes.Caption: Store configuration in
PropertyTypes.Description: When Browser local storage is selected, the configuration is scoped to a browser profile. This configuration is not tied to a Mendix user.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Attribute
PropertyTypes.Description: Attribute containing the personalized configuration of the capabilities. This configuration is automatically stored and loaded. The attribute requires Unlimited String.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Filter section
PropertyTypes.Description: Assistive technology will read this upon reaching a filtering or sorting section.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Export progress
PropertyTypes.Description: Assistive technology will read this upon reaching a export dialog.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Cancel data export
PropertyTypes.Description: Assistive technology will read this upon reaching a cancel button.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Select row
PropertyTypes.Description: If selection is enabled, assistive technology will read this upon reaching a checkbox.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Select all row
PropertyTypes.Description: If selection is enabled, assistive technology will read this upon reaching 'Select all' checkbox.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Row count singular
PropertyTypes.Description: Must include '%d' to denote number position ('%d row selected')

PropertyTypes.Caption: Row count plural
PropertyTypes.Description: Must include '%d' to denote number position ('%d rows selected')
